en: The LORD spoke to Moses on Mount Sinai, saying,
zh: 耶和華在西奈山對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you come into the land that I give you, the land shall keep a Sabbath to the LORD.
zh: “你要告訴以色列人，對他們說：你們到了我賜給你們的那地以後，地要守耶和華的安息。

en: For six years you shall sow your field, and for six years you shall prune your vineyard and gather in its fruits,
zh: 六年之內，你要耕種田地；六年之內，你要修剪葡萄園，收藏地的出產；

en: but in the seventh year there shall be a Sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a Sabbath to the LORD. You shall not sow your field or prune your vineyard.
zh: 但是第七年，地要完全休歇，享受耶和華的安息；你不可耕種田地，也不可修剪葡萄園。

en: You shall not reap what grows of itself in your harvest, or gather the grapes of your undressed vine. It shall be a year of solemn rest for the land.
zh: 你收割以後自然生長的莊稼，你不可收割；沒有修剪的葡萄樹果子，你也不可採摘；這一年，地要完全休歇。

en: The Sabbath of the land shall provide food for you, for yourself and for your male and female slaves and for your hired servant and the sojourner who lives with you,
zh: 地在安息年的自然出產，是給你們作食物的；就是給你，你的僕婢、雇工和寄居的，就是與你們一起居住的人；

en: and for your cattle and for the wild animals that are in your land: all its yield shall be for food.
zh: 甚至你的牲畜，以及你那地的走獸，都以安息年的出產作食物。

en: "You shall count seven weeks of years, seven times seven years, so that the time of the seven weeks of years shall give you forty-nine years.
zh: “你又要為自己計算七個安息年，就是七個七年，你經過了七個安息年，四十九年的日子以後，

en: Then you shall sound the loud trumpet on the tenth day of the seventh month. On the Day of Atonement you shall sound the trumpet throughout all your land.
zh: 在七月初十，你要吹角，在贖罪日，角聲要響遍你的全地。

en: And you shall consecrate the fiftieth year, and proclaim liberty throughout the land to all its inhabitants. It shall be a jubilee for you, when each of you shall return to his property and each of you shall return to his clan.
zh: 你們要把第五十年分別為聖，向全地所有居民宣布自由；這一年是你們的禧年，你們各人要歸回自己的地業，歸回自己的父家。

en: That fiftieth year shall be a jubilee for you; in it you shall neither sow nor reap what grows of itself nor gather the grapes from the undressed vines.
zh: 第五十年是你們的禧年；這一年你們不可耕種，也不可收割自然生長的，也不可採摘沒有修剪的葡萄樹果子。

en: For it is a jubilee. It shall be holy to you. You may eat the produce of the field.
zh: 因為這是禧年，你們要當作聖年；你們可以吃地裡的出產。

en: "In this year of jubilee each of you shall return to his property.
zh: “在這禧年中，你們各人要歸回自己的地業。

en: And if you make a sale to your neighbor or buy from your neighbor, you shall not wrong one another.
zh: 如果你賣甚麼給鄰舍，或是從鄰舍的手裡買甚麼，你們不可欺負對方。

en: You shall pay your neighbor according to the number of years after the jubilee, and he shall sell to you according to the number of years for crops.
zh: 你要按照下一個禧年以前還剩餘的年數向鄰舍買；他也要按照這年數可得的出產價值賣給你。

en: If the years are many, you shall increase the price, and if the years are few, you shall reduce the price, for it is the number of the crops that he is selling to you.
zh: 年數多，你付的買價就要增多。年數少，你付的買價就要減少。因為他是按出產的數值賣給你。

en: You shall not wrong one another, but you shall fear your God, for I am the LORD your God.
zh: 你們不可欺負對方，卻要敬畏你的 神，因為我是耶和華你們的 神。

en: "Therefore you shall do my statutes and keep my rules and perform them, and then you will dwell in the land securely.
zh: “所以你們要遵行我的律例，謹守我的典章，遵照奉行，就可以在那地安然居住。

en: The land will yield its fruit, and you will eat your fill and dwell in it securely.
zh: 地必生產果實，你們就可以吃飽，在那地安然居住。

en: And if you say, 'What shall we eat in the seventh year, if we may not sow or gather in our crop?'
zh: 如果你們問：在第七年我們不耕種，也不收藏我們的出產，我們吃甚麼呢？

en: I will command my blessing on you in the sixth year, so that it will produce a crop sufficient for three years.
zh: 在第六年，我必命我的福臨到你們，地就會生產足夠三年食用的出產。

en: When you sow in the eighth year, you will be eating some of the old crop; you shall eat the old until the ninth year, when its crop arrives.
zh: 第八年你們耕種時，仍有舊糧吃；直到第九年，收成新糧的時候，你還有舊糧可吃。

en: "The land shall not be sold in perpetuity, for the land is mine. For you are strangers and sojourners with me.
zh: “地不可永遠賣掉，因為地是我的；你們在我面前不過是寄居的和客旅。

en: And in all the country you possess, you shall allow a redemption of the land.
zh: 在你們所得為業的全地，你們應該讓人有贖地的權利。

en: "If your brother becomes poor and sells part of his property, then his nearest redeemer shall come and redeem what his brother has sold.
zh: 如果你的兄弟貧窮，賣了部分地業，他的至親可以來，把兄弟所賣的贖回。

en: If a man has no one to redeem it and then himself becomes prosperous and finds sufficient means to redeem it,
zh: 如果沒有代贖人，而他自己的經濟能力改善，足夠把地贖回，

en: let him calculate the years since he sold it and pay back the balance to the man to whom he sold it, and then return to his property.
zh: 他就要計算賣地的年數，把餘剩年數的出產數值還給那買主，他就可以收回自己的地業。

en: But if he has not sufficient means to recover it, then what he sold shall remain in the hand of the buyer until the year of jubilee. In the jubilee it shall be released, and he shall return to his property.
zh: 如果他沒有足夠的能力為自己收回賣了的地，他所賣的就要存在買主的手裡，直到禧年；到了禧年，買主必須把地歸還，賣地的人可以收回自己的地業。

en: "If a man sells a dwelling house in a walled city, he may redeem it within a year of its sale. For a full year he shall have the right of redemption.
zh: “如果有人賣了一所城內的住宅，在賣了以後的一整年之內，他有贖回的權利；在這些日子以內，他隨時可贖回。

en: If it is not redeemed within a full year, then the house in the walled city shall belong in perpetuity to the buyer, throughout his generations; it shall not be released in the jubilee.
zh: 如果滿了一年期不贖回，那所城內的房屋，就要確定歸買主世世代代為業；就算到了禧年，買主也不必交出退還。

en: But the houses of the villages that have no wall around them shall be classified with the fields of the land. They may be redeemed, and they shall be released in the jubilee.
zh: 但房屋在四圍沒有城牆的村莊裡，就要算為鄉下的田地一樣，是可以贖回的；到了禧年，買主要交出退還。

en: As for the cities of the Levites, the Levites may redeem at any time the houses in the cities they possess.
zh: 至於利未人的城，就是他們所得為業的城，其中的房屋，利未人有隨時可以贖回的權利。

en: And if one of the Levites exercises his right of redemption, then the house that was sold in a city they possess shall be released in the jubilee. For the houses in the cities of the Levites are their possession among the people of Israel.
zh: 如果一個利未人在他所得為業的城裡，沒有贖回已經賣了的房屋，到了禧年，買主仍要交出退還；因為利未人城裡的房屋，是他們在以色列人中的產業。

en: But the fields of pastureland belonging to their cities may not be sold, for that is their possession forever.
zh: 只是他們城郊之地不可出賣，因為是他們永遠的地業。

en: "If your brother becomes poor and cannot maintain himself with you, you shall support him as though he were a stranger and a sojourner, and he shall live with you.
zh: “如果你的兄弟貧窮，在你那裡手頭拮据，你要資助他，使他可以與你一同生活，像旅客寄居的一樣。

en: Take no interest from him or profit, but fear your God, that your brother may live beside you.
zh: 你不可向他收取高利，卻要敬畏你的 神，使你的兄弟可以與你一同生活。

en: You shall not lend him your money at interest, nor give him your food for profit.
zh: 你借錢給他，不可向他取利息；借糧給他，也不可要他多還。

en: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt to give you the land of Canaan, and to be your God.
zh: 我是耶和華你們的 神，曾經把你們從埃及地領出來，要把迦南地賜給你們，而且要作你們的 神。

en: "If your brother becomes poor beside you and sells himself to you, you shall not make him serve as a slave:
zh: “你的兄弟在你那裡若是貧窮了，賣身給你，你不可逼他作奴僕的工作。

en: he shall be with you as a hired servant and as a sojourner. He shall serve with you until the year of the jubilee.
zh: 他在你那裡要像雇工和寄居的一樣；他要服事你直到禧年。

en: Then he shall go out from you, he and his children with him, and go back to his own clan and return to the possession of his fathers.
zh: 到了禧年，他和他的兒女要離開你，歸回他本家，歸回自己祖宗的地業。

en: For they are my servants, whom I brought out of the land of Egypt; they shall not be sold as slaves.
zh: 因為他們是我的僕人，是我從埃及地領出來的，他們不可以賣作奴僕。

en: You shall not rule over him ruthlessly but shall fear your God.
zh: 你不可嚴嚴地轄制他，卻要敬畏你的 神。

en: As for your male and female slaves whom you may have: you may buy male and female slaves from among the nations that are around you.
zh: 至於你需要的僕婢，可以來自你們四圍的列國，你們可以從他們中間購買奴婢。

en: You may also buy from among the strangers who sojourn with you and their clans that are with you, who have been born in your land, and they may be your property.
zh: 你們也可以從那些與你們住在一起的外人的兒女中，或是從他們的家族中，就是那些與你們在一起，在你們境內所生的，購買奴婢；他們要作你們的產業。

en: You may bequeath them to your sons after you to inherit as a possession forever. You may make slaves of them, but over your brothers the people of Israel you shall not rule, one over another ruthlessly.
zh: 你們要把他們留給你們的子孫作永遠的產業，你們要從他們中間取奴僕；只是你們的兄弟以色列人，你們卻不可苛刻管轄。

en: "If a stranger or sojourner with you becomes rich, and your brother beside him becomes poor and sells himself to the stranger or sojourner with you or to a member of the stranger's clan,
zh: “在你中間寄居的外人或是客旅若是富足起來，你的兄弟在他那裡卻漸漸窮乏，把自己賣給住在你那裡寄居的外人或客旅的家族，

en: then after he is sold he may be redeemed. One of his brothers may redeem him,
zh: 賣了自己以後，他仍有贖回的權利；他兄弟中的任何一個都可以贖他；

en: or his uncle or his cousin may redeem him, or a close relative from his clan may redeem him. Or if he grows rich he may redeem himself.
zh: 他的叔伯或是他叔伯的兒子可以贖他，他家族中的骨肉至親也可以贖他；如果他自己的經濟能力改善，也可以自贖。

en: He shall calculate with his buyer from the year when he sold himself to him until the year of jubilee, and the price of his sale shall vary with the number of years. The time he was with his owner shall be rated as the time of a hired servant.
zh: 他要與買主計算，從賣身那一年起，直到禧年為止；照著年數的多少，按雇工的工價計算贖銀。

en: If there are still many years left, he shall pay proportionately for his redemption some of his sale price.
zh: 如果賣身時還有很多年才到禧年，他就要按著年數，照他賣身的價銀按比例償還他的贖價。

en: If there remain but a few years until the year of jubilee, he shall calculate and pay for his redemption in proportion to his years of service.
zh: 如果距離禧年只有幾年，他就按著年數，與買主計算，按雇工的工價，償還他的贖價。

en: He shall treat him as a servant hired year by year. He shall not rule ruthlessly over him in your sight.
zh: 買主要像每年雇用的工人那樣待他。不可在你眼前苛刻地管轄他。

en: And if he is not redeemed by these means, then he and his children with him shall be released in the year of jubilee.
zh: 如果他不在這些年間把自己贖回，到了禧年，也可以和他的兒女一同離去。

en: For it is to me that the people of Israel are servants. They are my servants whom I brought out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
zh: 因為以色列人都是屬我的僕人；他們是我的僕人，是我把他們從埃及地領了出來的；我是耶和華你們的 神。”
